description: Resource Type definition for AWS::Glue::Blueprint. Registers a blueprint with AWS Glue.

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Key.description: The key name of the tag.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the blueprint.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the blueprint.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the blueprint.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^[\.\-_A-Za-z0-9]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

BlueprintLocation.description: Specifies a path in Amazon S3 where the blueprint is published.
BlueprintLocation.markdownDescription:
Specifies a path in Amazon S3 where the blueprint is published.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 8192  
Pattern: ^s3://([^/]+)/([^/]+/)*([^/]+)$  
Update requires: No interruption

Description.markdownDescription:
A description of the blueprint.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 512  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.description: The tags to be applied to this blueprint.
Tags.markdownDescription:
The tags to be applied to this blueprint.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

Status.description: The status of the blueprint registration.
Status.markdownDescription:
The status of the blueprint registration.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATING | ACTIVE | UPDATING | FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreatedOn.markdownDescription:
The date and time the blueprint was registered.

Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
